name: GET /api/integrations/google/files
description: Lists the user's Google Docs and PDFs from Drive.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.value: {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/integrations/google/files', 'details': {'tags': ['Integrations'], 'summary': 'List Google Drive Files', 'description': "Lists the user's Google Docs and PDFs from Drive.", 'operationId': 'list_google_drive_files_api_integrations_google_files_get', 'security': [{'OAuth2PasswordBearer': []}], 'parameters': [{'name': 'X-Token', 'in': 'header', 'required': False, 'schema': {'anyOf': [{'type': 'string'}, {'type': 'null'}], 'title': 'X-Token'}}], 'responses': {'200': {'description': 'Successful Response', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'type': 'array', 'items': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/GoogleFile'}, 'title': 'Response List Google Drive Files Api Integrations Google Files Get'}}}}, '422': {'description': 'Validation Error', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError'}}}}}}}
